Description
AALOAD
 
AASTORE
 
AbstractExecutionIndexingState
A mutable state representing the current call stack with prefix counts, used to compute light-weight execution indexes.
AbstractLogger
 
ACONST_NULL
 
AFLDriver
 
AFLGuidance
A front-end that uses AFL for guided fuzzing.
AllocEvent
 
ALOAD
 
ANEWARRAY
 
ARETURN
 
ArgumentsGenerator
Turns one input into the arguments for a single trial.
ArgumentsGeneratorFactory
Builds an ArgumentsGenerator for a specific test method.

ASTORE
 
ATHROW
 
BALOAD
 
BASTORE
 
BIPUSH
 
BranchEvent
 
CallEvent
 
CALOAD
 
CASTORE
 
CHECKCAST
 
Comparison
The Comparison annotation marks a method as a comparison function for regression-based fuzz testing.
ConditionalBranch
 
ControlFlowInstructionVisitor
This is an instruction visitor that has additional convenience methods for visiting control-flow instructions.
Counter
Maps integer keys to integer counts using a fixed-size table.
Coverage
Utility class to collect branch and function coverage
CoverageFactory

DADD

DASTORE

DCMPL
 
DCONST_0

DDIV
 
DefaultInstructionVisitor
An implementation of the Janala instruction visitor interface that does nothing for each instruction.
DiffException
 
DiffFuzz
The DiffFuzz annotation marks a method as an entry-point for regression-based fuzz testing.
DiffFuzzGuidance
 
DiffFuzzNoGuidance
 
DiffFuzzReproGuidance
 
DiffTrialExecutor
Wraps a TrialExecutor to capture each trial's outcome for differential fuzzing.
DLOAD
 
DMUL
 
DNEG
 
DoublyLinkedList<T>
 
DREM
 
DRETURN
 
DSTORE
 
DSUB
 
DUP
 
DUP_X1
 
DUP_X2
 
DUP2
 
DUP2_X1
 
DUP2_X2
 
ExecutionContext
A representation of an execution index sans the counts, equivalent to a call stack.
ExecutionIndex
An execution index represents a unique point in a program's execution.
ExecutionIndex.Prefix
 
ExecutionIndex.Suffix
 
ExecutionIndexingDriver
Entry point for fuzzing with Execution Indexing.
ExecutionIndexingGuidance
A guidance that represents inputs as maps from execution indexes to parameters.
F2D
 
F2I
 
F2L
 
FADD
 
FALOAD
 
FastBlockingQueue<T>
A blocking queue for single-producer and single-consumer where the producer and consumer never change and are distinct threads.
FastCoverageListener
 
FastCoverageListener.Default
 
FastCoverageMethodAdapter
 
FastCoverageSnoop
 
FastExecutionIndexingState
 
FastNonCollidingCounter
An implementation of Counter that uses an IntIntHashMap to store values "Fast" in that it is faster than using something that involves other HashMaps, and boxing to-and-from primitive values.
FastNonCollidingCoverage
Utility class to collect branch and function coverage
FASTORE
 
FastSourceOfRandomness
A source of randomness with better performance but looser statistical guarantees.
FCMPG
 
FCMPL
 
FCONST_0
 
FCONST_1
 
FCONST_2
 
FDIV
 
FLOAD
 
FMUL
 
FNEG
 
FREM
 
FRETURN
 
FSTORE
 
FSUB
 
Fuzz
The Fuzz annotation marks a method as an entry-point for coverage-guided fuzz testing.
FuzzFramework
A test-framework integration that supplies the execution half of a fuzzing run.
FuzzResult
The outcome of a fuzzing campaign for one test method.
FuzzRunner
The fuzzing loop, independent of any test framework.
FuzzStatement
A JUnit Statement that runs a method under guided fuzz testing.
FuzzTest
Marks a method as a JQF/Zest fuzz-test entry point for JUnit 5 (Jupiter).

GETVALUE

GETVALUE_short
 
GETVALUE_void
 
GlobalStateForInstrumentation
An object to keep track of (classId, methodId, instructionId) tuples during instrumentation.
GOTO
 
Guidance
A front-end for guided fuzzing.
GuidanceException
 
GuidedFuzzing
 
GuidedFuzzing.GuidanceSupplier
Functional interface for creating guidance instances
Hashing
Utility class for computing bounded hash values.

InvokeInstruction

INVOKEMETHOD_END

IVisitor
 
IXOR
 
JanalaExecutionIndexingState
ExecutionIndexingState implementation for Janala instrumentation framework.
JetCheckArgumentsGenerator
Generates one trial's arguments by running the per-parameter jetCheck generators against the engine's guided byte stream.
JetCheckArgumentsGenerator.Builder
Builds a JetCheckArgumentsGenerator.
JetCheckArgumentsGeneratorFactory
Builds jetCheck-backed ArgumentsGenerators.
JetCheckGeneration
Runs a jetCheck Generator against JQF's guided byte stream.
JQF
This class extends JUnit and Quickcheck runners to enable guided fuzz testing.
JqfFinding
Wraps the first failing input found by a fuzzing campaign so Jupiter reports it as a test failure.
JQFTestExtension
The Jupiter extension behind FuzzTest.
JSR
 
Junit4FuzzFramework
The JUnit 4 execution provider, discoverable through ServiceLoader.
Junit4ResultClassifier
Classifies trial throwables for the JUnit 4 run path.
Junit4TrialExecutor
Runs trials through a JUnit 4 TrialRunner.
Junit4TrialExecutorFactory
Builds Junit4TrialExecutors.
JUnit5FuzzConfig
Reads a @FuzzTest's run configuration from its annotation, system properties, the environment, and any externally installed guidance.
JUnit5FuzzConfig.NamedInput
A named source of one regression input's bytes.
Junit5FuzzFramework
The JUnit 5 execution provider, discoverable through ServiceLoader.
JUnit5FuzzRunner
The reusable JUnit 5 fuzzing entry point.
Junit5ResultClassifier
Classifies trial throwables for the JUnit 5 run path.
Junit5TrialExecutor
Runs trials reflectively under a JUnit 5 (Jupiter) lifecycle.
Junit5TrialExecutorFactory
Builds Junit5TrialExecutors.

Author: Koushik Sen (ksen@cs.berkeley.edu) Date: 6/21/12 Time: 5:02 PM
MapOfCounters
Maps integer keys to integer counts using a fixed-size table.
MemberRef
 
METHOD_BEGIN
 
METHOD_THROW
A special marker instruction indicating that the method is exiting abruptly due to an exception being thrown, and thus the stack frame must be destroyed.
MONITORENTER
 
MONITOREXIT
 
MovingAverage
MovingAverage - A data structure for collecting a moving average.
MULTIANEWARRAY
 
MultipleFailuresError
Aggregates several trial failures from one fuzzing campaign into a single error.
NEW
 
NEWARRAY
 
NoGuidance
A front-end that only generates random inputs.
NonTrackingGenerationStatus
Provides a generation status that does not track the number of trials generated so far.
NonZeroCachingCounter
An extension of Counter that caches which entries are non-zero.
NOP
 
Observability
 
Outcome
 
PerfFuzzDriver
 
PerfFuzzGuidance
A front-end that uses AFL for increasing performance counters in addition to code coverage.
PerfFuzzGuidance.PerfFeedbackType
Configuration of what feedback to send AFL in second-half of map.
POP
 
POP2
 
PrintLogger
 
ProducerHashMap<K,V>
 
PUTFIELD
 
PUTSTATIC
 
QuickcheckArgumentsGenerator
An ArgumentsGenerator backed by junit-quickcheck generators.
QuickcheckArgumentsGeneratorFactory
Builds junit-quickcheck-backed ArgumentsGenerators.
RandomDriver
 
ReadEvent
 
ReproDriver
 
ReproGuidance
A front-end that provides a specified set of inputs for test case reproduction, This class enables reproduction of a test case with an input file generated by a guided fuzzing front-end such as AFL.
ReproServerDriver
 
ReproServerGuidance
 
Result
Represents the result of a guided fuzzing trial.
ResultClassifier
Classifies a throwable raised by a trial into an engine-level outcome.
RET
 
RETURN
 
ReturnEvent
 
SafeClassWriter
A ClassWriter that computes the common super class of two classes without actually loading them with a ClassLoader.
SALOAD
 
SASTORE
 
Serializer
 
SingleSnoop
 
SIPUSH
 
SkipTrialException
Signals that the current input cannot produce a trial and should be skipped.
SnoopInstructionClassAdapter
 
SnoopInstructionMethodAdapter
 
SnoopInstructionTransformer
 
SPECIAL
A special probe instruction added by the instrumentation.
Stack<T>
 
StreamBackedRandom
This class extends Random to act as a generator of "random" values, which themselves are read from a static file.
StringLogger
 
StringPrintLogger
 
SWAP
 
TABLESWITCH
 
ThreadTracer
This class is responsible for tracing for an instruction stream generated by a single thread in the application.
ThrowingRunnable
A version of Runnable that throws arbitrary, possibly checked, exceptions.
TimeoutException
 
TraceEvent
An interface representing by a trace event such as CALL, RETURN or BRANCH.
TraceEventVisitor
Visitor class for TraceEvent instances.
TraceLogger
A singleton class which manages per-thread tracers.
TrialExecutor
Runs a single trial of a test method with generated arguments.
TrialExecutorFactory
Builds a TrialExecutor for a specific test method.
TrialRunner
 
TryCatchBlock
Author: Koushik Sen (ksen@cs.berkeley.edu) Date: 7/1/12 Time: 10:50 PM
Utils
 
ZestCLI
CLI for Zest based guidance.
ZestDriver
Entry point for fuzzing with Zest.
ZestGuidance
A guidance that performs coverage-guided fuzzing using two coverage maps, one for all inputs and one for valid inputs only.
ZestGuidance.Input<K>
A candidate or saved test input that maps objects of type K to bytes.
